decoder_heading: 1. What is personal information and what is processing of personal information
ident_heading: 1. What is personal information and what is processing of personal information

heading_content_part: personal information and what is processing of personal informationPersonal information (or data) is any information relating to you and that alone or in cumulation with other pieces      of information gives the opportunity to the person that collects and processes such information to identify you as      a person. It can be your name, your identification number, your location data, or information related to your physical,      physiological, genetic, mental, economic, cultural or social life.
Processing of the information means any action      with your personal data, for example, collection, recording, organisation, structuring, storage, use, disclosure      by any means and so on.

Personal information we collectWhile we do not collect or otherwise process any personal information for our own purposes, some personal information      is collected by AdMobâ€”our advertising partner. The AdMob SDK is bundled within our product for the purpose of serving ads,      in accordance with the respective privacy policy of Google (policies.google.com/privacy).Please note that we keep our product free by showing ads.For users within the EEA (where GDPR applies):
